mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.course_id, s.staff_type, s.audit_status, s.apply_time, u.nick_name, u.avatar, u.dept_id FROM osh_course_staff s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE s.course_id = #{courseId} AND s.is_active = 1 AND s.audit_status = 'approved'
SELECT * FROM osh_course_staff WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE osh_course_staff
audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = NOW(),
audit_remark = #{auditRemark},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
